name: Monthly Performance Review
description: A comprehensive report analyzing all data from the past month: score trends, dimension breakdown, consistency, community participation, and level-readiness. Pilot: includes a 1-on-1 voice meeting. Scale: async report + optional group session.

report_contents.section_1_headline: One-line summary of the month ('Strong consistency — ready for advancement soon')

metrics: Task completion rate (% of possible tasks)
section_4_consistency.interpretation: Is the learner consistent or sporadic?

section_5_community.interpretation: How engaged is the learner with the community?

section_6_level_readiness.calculation: Based on latest scores vs advancement criteria (§2.5 Table 12)
section_6_level_readiness.output: Percentage estimate of readiness (e.g., '72% ready for L1')
section_6_level_readiness.missing_criteria: List of specific criteria not yet met

section_7_ai_recommendations.based_on: Weakest dimension + error patterns from submissions
section_7_ai_recommendations.format: 3 specific, actionable recommendations for next month
section_7_ai_recommendations.example: Focus 10 extra minutes/day on phoneme drills (accent score is 15 points below other dimensions)

section_8_next_month_plan.adjusted_focus: If a dimension is lagging, recommend shifting time allocation

pilot_phase.format: Written report (generated by AI prompt #10) + 15-minute 1-on-1 voice session with founder
session_agenda: 2 min: Celebrate wins (specific things done well this month)
5 min: Review scores + identify the one biggest growth area
3 min: Discuss challenges (what was hard? what didn't work?)
3 min: Set 2-3 goals for next month together
pilot_phase.session_language: Arabic for L0 (bilingual). English for L1+.

scale_phase.format: Auto-generated async report (DM) + optional group 'monthly review' voice session
human_meeting_reserved_for: At Risk or Critical rating learners
scale_phase.group_session: Monthly 30-min group voice session where founder discusses common themes + answers questions

triggers_and_actions.improving_trend: Celebrate + suggest maintaining approach + hint at advancement exam
triggers_and_actions.stable_trend: Acknowledge consistency + identify one thing to push forward
triggers_and_actions.declining_trend: Supportive check-in + buddy outreach + offer to adjust plan + ask what's happening in life
triggers_and_actions.at_risk_rating: Immediate 1-on-1 scheduled + buddy daily check-ins + plan adjustment offered
